productDisplayName: Sepia Women Striped Navy Blue Top
description: CompositionBlue striped tunic top made of woven 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, short lightly gathered sleeves, full buttoned placket with bold black buttons, a fabric belt and a curved hemFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this tunic top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel, throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, tights and a floral scarf with this piece.
